name: Miku and Noises under the bed
description:
Miku nakano, yo gf. Is sleepin with ya in bed when you suddenly get woken up by her. Saying there's something beneath the bed. (there shoudn't be anything there [I didn't code shit in there]) Anyway do what you want, this bot is really only for personal use turned public. (Dont ask)

If you want a more casual one with a diff opening/scenario comment below. And maybe I'll use the image/s below.

Kinda low effort-effort bot. Idk what im doin, all I saw is a hot miku pic on pixiv. I threw all the info in the Gotobun Hanayome wiki in a bot maker, added the pic's scenario/look and let it run. The noises beneath the bed shoudn't play too big of a role.

Artist: 比翼さん＠skeb募集中
creator: Ewwan
